g.title: cluster_1
g.text: Design Phase 1: Ensure TFL is Ebb-and-Flow with Security Sufficient to Invest More Effort

a.xlink:title: Electric-Coin-Company/tfl-book#39 Analyze Attack Scenario: Compromised Finality Oracle + Miner only finalizes that miner's blocks
Electric-Coin-Company/tfl-book#49 Clarify our "weakest link" security concerns in precise questions.

Electric-Coin-Company/tfl-book#48 Write Best-Effort / Napkin Math approximation of Min. Cost of Known Attack metric for several attacks.
Electric-Coin-Company/tfl-book#33 Distinguish intra-book links from external links.
Electric-Coin-Company/tfl-book#46 Document the Single-Step PoS transition alternative to Multi-Step PoS transition and our rationale.
Electric-Coin-Company/tfl-book#23 Add Design Goals, Anti- Goals, and Out-of-Scope Goals
Electric-Coin-Company/tfl-book#59 Make terminology linkable so that references can link directly to definitions.

Electric-Coin-Company/tfl-book#63 Update Next Steps to show completed items.

Electric-Coin-Company/tfl-book#60 Finish safety argument for Crosslink
